# CV Analyser — Share2Inspire

> CV Analyser is an AI-powered CV/resume analysis tool developed by Share2Inspire in Portugal. It analyses CVs in PDF format and provides an ATS compatibility score, recruiter perception analysis, salary estimation, automation risk assessment, and a 30-day improvement plan.

CV Analyser is designed for professionals at any career stage — from recent graduates to senior executives — who want to understand how their CV is perceived by the market and improve their professional competitiveness.

## Features

- [ATS Score](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/cv-analyser/): A score from 0 to 100 evaluating CV compatibility with Applicant Tracking Systems, including formatting, keyword density, and structure.
- [Recruiter Perception](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/cv-analyser/): Analysis across 4 quadrants — Technical Skills, Professional Experience, Education & Certifications, Soft Skills — with individual scores and detailed feedback.
- [Salary Estimation](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/cv-analyser/): Market salary range estimation based on CV content, job title, experience level, and selected country/region.
- [Automation Risk](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/cv-analyser/): Analysis of how susceptible the identified role and skills are to automation, with future-proofing recommendations.
- [Before/After Suggestions](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/cv-analyser/): Concrete improvement suggestions with side-by-side comparisons of CV sections.
- [30-Day Plan](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/cv-analyser/): A structured week-by-week plan for improving the CV and professional positioning.

## Pricing

- Essential Plan: $3.99 per analysis — includes ATS score and quadrant analysis
- Complete Plan: $6.99 per analysis — includes all features

## Information

- [Main Page](https://www.share2inspire.pt/en/cv-analyser/): CV Analyser in English
- [Portuguese Version](https://www.share2inspire.pt/cv-analyser/): CV Analyser in Portuguese
- [Share2Inspire](https://www.share2inspire.pt/): Main website
- [Founder — Samuel Rolo](https://www.linkedin.com/in/samuelrolo/): 12+ years in HR transformation, former Senior Manager at Deloitte

## Payments

Accepts PayPal, Stripe (Visa, Mastercard, and other credit/debit cards), and voucher codes.
